data_item: LightRail NCE BGA-2500 ball map and voltage bank definition
current_repo_state: Custom BGA-2500 placeholders carry only partial auxiliary/TFLN control nets; analyzer shows 174 pads on a part named BGA-2500, so the current package is not a complete BGA-2500 representation.
required_input: Approved ball map with ball name, signal name, direction, IO standard, voltage bank, power/ground pins, NC pins, differential pair mate, package orientation, escape/keepout constraints, and any reserved/service balls.
blocking_next_step: Blocks schematic pin completion, ERC, back-annotation parity, routing, and planes.
notes: No public source can infer custom NCE connectivity.

data_item: HBM4 stack package ball map and channel assignment
current_repo_state: Twelve HBM4-16GB placements use SK_HBM4_16GB_12H and placeholder BGA-1024 footprints with only 17 parsed pads and zero nets.
required_input: Exact orderable HBM4 MPN, vendor package drawing, stack height, ball map, channel map, power rails, reference clocks, reset/training/control pins, interposer/escape rules, and NCE-to-HBM channel assignment.
owner: Memory vendor / package owner / LightRail architect
blocking_next_step: Blocks HBM hierarchy, ERC, length matching, lane assignment, stackup selection, and route feasibility.
notes: Public HBM4 announcements confirm interface class but do not provide a usable package ball map.

data_item: TFLN PIC/module pad map and electro-optic interface
current_repo_state: Custom TFLN-MZM-400G-C footprint has 82 pads and only partial L/R control nets; RF/bias/heater/monitor/optical data is not defined in the repository.
required_input: Vendor pad table with pad number/name, function, direction, RF impedance, bias range/polarity, heater and monitor pins, ground/shield pins, optical orientation, package drawing, and handling/ESD constraints.
owner: TFLN module vendor / LightRail photonics owner
blocking_next_step: Blocks TFLN schematic hierarchy, RF/bias routing, power integrity, thermal checks, and optical/mechanical signoff.
notes: Existing nets are insufficient to define the photonic design.

required_input: The repo has placements and partial nets, but not a complete electrical allocation for power tree, PCIe/fabric lanes, clocks, BMC buses, resets, enables, telemetry, and test points.
blocking_next_step: Power tree with rail names/voltages/current budget, VRM phase map, PMBus/I2C address map, clock output plan, PCIe/fabric lane map, reset/boot strap table, JTAG/debug/testpoint map, and DNP/population options.
column9: Blocks ERC clean, parity 0, stackup target, routing rules, plane pours, and final Gerber regeneration.
column10: This cannot be synthesized from footprints or Gerbers.
